title: Remembering the victims of climate disaster and building resilience
content: Against the backdrop of a summer already marked by heatwaves and wildfires across much of Europe, the European Commission honoured those lost to and affected by the climate crisis while underlining measures to better manage climate risks and strengthen disaster prevention, preparedness and response.

title: Commission provides guidance to Google for AI interoperability on Android and sharing of Google Search data under the Digital Markets Act
content: Commission provides guidance to Google for AI interoperability on Android and sharing of Google Search data under the DMA
snippet: Commission provides guidance to Google for AI interoperability on Android and sharing of Google Search data under the DMA

title: EU Institutional LLM released as an open model
content: The EU Institutional LLM is now available for download, by any EU-based legal entity. It offers more inclusive coverage of EU languages.
snippet: The EU Institutional LLM is now available for download, by any EU-based legal entity. It offers more inclusive coverage of EU languages.

title: Commission presents the assessment on the application of the new asylum responsibility rules
content: The Commission adopted a first assessment on the current application of the new responsibility rules under the Pact on Migration and Asylum. It covers the first three weeks since the Pact entered into application (12 June 2026).
snippet: The Commission adopted a first assessment on the current application of the new responsibility rules under the Pact on Migration and Asylum. It covers the first three weeks since the Pact entered into

title: EU and Türkiye: a new agreement to strengthen customs cooperation
content: The European Commission welcomes today’s Decision adopted by the EU-Türkiye Customs Cooperation Committee (CCC) to mutually recognise the respective Authorised Economic Operator programmes (AEO MRA).
snippet: The European Commission welcomes today’s Decision adopted by the EU-Türkiye Customs Cooperation Committee (CCC) to mutually recognise the respective Authorised Economic Operator programmes (AEO MRA).

title: EU and India strengthen strategic partnership with third Trade and Technology Council
content: Today, the European Union and India held the third meeting of their Trade and Technology Council (TTC) in Brussels, reaffirming the TTC as a central platform for cooperation on trade, technology and security.
snippet: Today, the European Union and India held the third meeting of their Trade and Technology Council (TTC) in Brussels, reaffirming the TTC as a central platform for cooperation on trade, technology and

title: Ukraine Facility unlocks investment opportunities for dual-use and defence-related industries
content: At the EU-Ukraine Defence Industry Forum in Kyiv, the European Commission presented financing opportunities available under Pillar II of the Ukraine Facility to support dual-use and defence-related projects in Ukraine.
snippet: At the EU-Ukraine Defence Industry Forum in Kyiv, the European Commission presented financing opportunities available under Pillar II of the Ukraine Facility to support dual-use and defence-related

title: Developments in migrant employment in Romania
content: The topic of migrant labour market integration has recently increased in Romanian public discourse. This is due to the upcoming pieces of policy legislation, against the backdrop of implementation of the EU Pact on Migration and Asylum:.

title: Recent research on migrant integration in Romania
content: A recent study published by the the Economic and Social Council examines barriers to labour market integration for third-country nationals (TCNs) in Romania, drawing on literature and focus groups conducted with migrant workers and employers.
snippet: A recent study published by the the Economic and Social Council examines barriers to labour market integration for third-country nationals (TCNs) in Romania, drawing on literature and focus groups

title: The Commission calls on EU countries to transpose the reinforced rules on the energy performance of buildings
content: The European Commission decided to open infringement procedures by sending letters of formal notice to all 27 EU Member States for failing to fully transpose into national law the provisions of the recast Energy Performance of Buildings Directive (EU) 2024/1275.

title: Survey on an EU Blueprint for intellectual property licensing and spinoff creation
content: The European Commission invites stakeholders to participate in a survey until 16 August 2026 on the upcoming EU Blueprint for IP licensing and spinoff creation.
snippet: The European Commission invites stakeholders to participate in a survey until 16 August 2026 on the upcoming EU Blueprint for IP licensing and spinoff creation.

title: EU trade relations with developing countries continue to create sustainable economic growth
content: Today, the European Commission and the High Representative for the Common Foreign and Security Policy published a new joint report on the implementation of the Generalised Scheme of Preferences (GSP) – the EU's main trade policy tool to support developing countries' exports to the bloc.
snippet: Today, the European Commission and the High Representative for the Common Foreign and Security Policy published a new joint report on the implementation of the Generalised Scheme of Preferences (GSP)

title: Government publishes research on integration issues and migrant housing statistics in France
content: According to statistics published by the Ministry of the Interior’s Statistical Studies and Documentation Department (DSED), in France overcrowded housing affects about 7% of households overall and disproportionately impacts migrants, many of whom are non-EU nationals.
snippet: According to statistics published by the Ministry of the Interior’s Statistical Studies and Documentation Department (DSED), in France overcrowded housing affects about 7% of households overall and

title: Commission approves Czech capacity mechanism under Clean Industrial Deal State Aid Framework
content: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, Czechia's market-wide capacity mechanism. The measure aims to ensure there is sufficient capacity to produce or store electricity, or to reduce electricity consumption so that production meets demand in the long term.
snippet: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, Czechia's market-wide capacity mechanism. The measure aims to ensure there is sufficient capacity to produce or store electricity, or to

title: Commission approves €300 million Irish State aid scheme for temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies
content: The European Commission has approved a €300 million Irish scheme to provide temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies in line with the objectives of the Clean Industrial Deal.
snippet: The European Commission has approved a €300 million Irish scheme to provide temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies in line with the objectives of the Clean Industrial Deal.

title: Commission approves €41 million Greek State aid for agricultural companies facing increased fertiliser prices
content: The European Commission has approved a €41 million Greek aid scheme to support agricultural companies facing increased fertiliser prices due to the Middle East crisis. The scheme was approved under the Middle East Crisis Temporary State Aid Framework adopted by the Commission on 29 April 2026.

title: Commission proposes €6.5 million to support over 1 900 dismissed workers in Belgium and Spain
content: The European Commission has proposed €6.5 million in EU funding to help 1 928 workers who lost their jobs in Belgium and Spain. The money would come from the European Globalisation Adjustment Fund for Displaced Workers (EGF).
snippet: The European Commission has proposed €6.5 million in EU funding to help 1 928 workers who lost their jobs in Belgium and Spain. The money would come from the European Globalisation Adjustment Fund for

title: Join the international bioeconomy community in Dublin - registration now open for the Global Bioeconomy Summit 2026
content: Join policymakers, researchers, industry and youth representatives at the Global Bioeconomy Summit 2026 in Dublin.
snippet: Join policymakers, researchers, industry and youth representatives at the Global Bioeconomy Summit 2026 in Dublin.

title: Market consultation for carrier service infrastructure based on Dense Wavelength Division Multiplexing technology
content: Directorate-General for Digital Services of the European Commission has launched a preliminary market consultation for information-gathering and market assessment capabilities for carrier service infrastructure based on Dense Wavelength Division Multiplexing (DWDM) technology.
snippet: Directorate-General for Digital Services of the European Commission has launched a preliminary market consultation for information-gathering and market assessment capabilities for carrier service

title: Malta's 'Explore the Variety, Eat Sustainable Fish’ initiative
content: An initiative by the Department of Fisheries and Aquaculture in Malta hopes to encourage people to choose from a wider range of local species. The ‘Explore the Variety, Eat Sustainable Fish’.
snippet: An initiative by the Department of Fisheries and Aquaculture in Malta hopes to encourage people to choose from a wider range of local species. The ‘Explore the Variety, Eat Sustainable Fish’.

title: Commission welcomes political agreement on the Programme for agile and rapid defence innovation (AGILE)
content: The European Commission welcomes the political agreement reached on 15 July 2026 between the European Parliament and the Council on the Programme for agile and rapid defence innovation (AGILE), to bring disruptive defence technology from the lab to the field at record speed.

title: How to thrive in the modern workplace using the new EU guidelines
content: From empowering jobseekers with new skills to helping employers find the right talent, discover how the EU’s new guidelines transform career support across Europe.
snippet: From empowering jobseekers with new skills to helping employers find the right talent, discover how the EU’s new guidelines transform career support across Europe.

title: Portugal sees developments in migrant integration initiatives, policies and research
content: Portugal’s Council of Ministers published Resolution No. 53-A/2026 in the Diário da República, extending the validity of Temporary Protection Titles for displaced persons from Ukraine until 4 March 2027.
snippet: Portugal’s Council of Ministers published Resolution No. 53-A/2026 in the Diário da República, extending the validity of Temporary Protection Titles for displaced persons from Ukraine until 4 March

title: European Skills High-Level Board calls for stronger business-education links to boost Europe’s skills development
content: The European Skills High-Level Board, presented by its Chair, Ylva Johansson, handed over its first conclusions. The conclusions call for regional and sectoral skills ecosystems to reskill adults faster and closer to where jobs actually are.
snippet: The European Skills High-Level Board, presented by its Chair, Ylva Johansson, handed over its first conclusions. The conclusions call for regional and sectoral skills ecosystems to reskill adults

title: Evaluation confirms Nitrates Directive is effective and relevant, but identifies scope for smarter implementation
content: A Commission assessment also identifies scope for smarter implementation of the decades-old law.
snippet: A Commission assessment also identifies scope for smarter implementation of the decades-old law.

title: Speech at the presentation of the Order of Europe by President Zelenskyy to President von der Leyen
content: It is a great honour to be back in Kyiv on this very special Day of Ukrainian Statehood. President Zelenskyy, dear Volodymyr, I want to thank you personally for the great privilege you are bestowing on me with this first-ever Order of Europe.

title: Commission upgrades import monitoring mechanism
content: To respond to growing imbalances in global trade, the European Commission is upgrading its import monitoring toolbox by reconfiguring its ‘import barometer’, which gathers up-to-date import data and was originally established in 2025.

title: European Commission’s new Skills Guarantee: all six pilot projects launched to support workers at risk of unemployment
content: Six pilot projects were selected and launched under the new Skills Guarantee. The pilot has a budget of €14.5 million and will support almost 1,200 European workers at risk of unemployment in the car industry by offering them on-the-job training and new jobs in growing sectors.
